title: ZIMPLI - 4 x Large UK Made Love Heart Bath Bombs Gift Set, Valentine's Day Present for Her, Women, Girlfriend, Wife, Mother's Day Gifts
features: PERFECT GIFT: Check out other styles and colours in the Zimpli Gifts store
MOISTURISING: Handmade and great for moisturising dry skin for Women, Her, Girlfriend, Girls
GREAT VALUE GIFT: Ideal present for Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Birthdays, Anniversaries, Xmas or Christmas
VEGAN FRIENDLY: Contains no animal products and is not tested on animals
SAFE: All Zimpli Gifts are skin safe, drain safe, easy clean and stain free
UK MADE: Made in the UK to strict European safety standards
description: Product Description Turn your tub into a floral paradise with a variety of adult bath bombs full of different aromas and essential oils. Bathe in luxury as you watch your bath bomb burst with colours and fizz all around your bath. All our products are handmade, vegan friendly, cruelty free, completely organic, and perfect for moisturising dry skin. They're also easy clean, stain free, drain safe and skin safe. They're ideal gifts for Valentine's Day, Christmas, Mother's Day, Birthday's and Anniversaries for your loved ones. Check out our full range of bath bomb gift sets in our Amazon store. Directions [PARTIAL] Not suitable for children under 3 years due to choking hazard of small parts - small balls. Adult supervision is required at all times. If the product comes into contact with eyes, wash with water for 10 minutes. If symptoms persist, consult a doctor. Non-irritating formula. For sensitive skin, test a small amount on the skin first. To avoid staining of the product, do not allow skin or wet surfaces to come into contact with the product before adding it to water. Once added to water, the product does not stain. If the product falls on surfaces, wipe it immediately. Inedible, do not eat. If the product is swallowed, drink plenty of cool water. The product is non-toxic. Will not clog drains. Keep packaging for future reference. Safety Warning Remove all packaging and add to warm water. If product gets into eyes, wash with water for 10 minutes. If symptoms persist seek medical advice. Non-irritant formula. For sensitive skin, test a small amount on skin first. Ingredients are printed on the packaging. Non-edible product, DO NOT EAT. If product is swallowed, drink plenty of fresh water. Product is non-toxic. Will not clog drains. Keep packaging for future reference. See more
